preferred_name: Thermographic device with single element detector

preferred_name_ml.en: Thermographic device with single element detector

definition: area temperature measuring device with a single detector that samples radiation sequentially across an area by opto-mechanical means

definition_ml.en: area temperature measuring device with a single detector that samples radiation sequentially across an area by opto-mechanical means
definition_ml.de: Thermografiegerät mit zeilenförmig angeordneten Einzeldetektoren, das die Strahlung einer Fläche sequenziell durch Scannen mit opto-mechanischen Mitteln abtastet

note: In thermographic devices with single-element detector, image sampling takes place with a two-dimensional sequential opto-mechanical sampling system consisting of rotating prisms or polygonal mirrors.

note_ml.en: In thermographic devices with single-element detector, image sampling takes place with a two-dimensional sequential opto-mechanical sampling system consisting of rotating prisms or polygonal mirrors.
note_ml.de: In Thermografiegeräten mit Einzelelementdetektoren findet eine zweidimensionale opto-mechanische Erfassung statt, die aus rotierenden Prismen oder polygonalen Spiegeln besteht.
